title: Some Music Discs
description: Want to add some music discs? Well you're in luck... sorta.
body:
# Some Music Discs

Do you ever just want some extra music discs into your world? Do you ever maybe want some of them to be... *cursed*? Well this mod adds a lot music discs into your world, all obtainable by killing creepers [and 2 craftable]!

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/99072163/187432107-3f3054d6-baa0-4eb7-9c8b-a479f1016226.png)

## Also we have a Crappy Sax
![Crappy Sax](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/89364072/171588138-6bcff514-8800-4484-93f5-c337b11aff0d.png)
